title: V1.32 P1 — Shared preset validator core + CLI/API parity

fixes_during_review: rev1: 2 Critical + 1 Warning (loader didn't use facade, daemon lost structural checks, daemon invalid-fixture coverage)
rev2: 1 Critical (runtime loader still didn't use A3 surface), 1 Warning (path safety tests + error sanitization), 1 perf W (O(n) registry lookup)

qa_summary: QA verification pending; covered by run-merged integration tests (cargo test -p nexus-orchestration, nexus-daemon-runtime, nexus42 command_surface_contract all green).
notes: Shared semantic validation facade in crates/nexus-orchestration/src/preset/validation.rs. Three public functions: validate_preset_semantic (A2 reachability/terminal/id/orphan), validate_assets_in_bundle (A3 asset existence + path safety + bundle dir id match), validate_path_safety (A3 standalone). CapabilityRegistry O(1) HashMap lookup. Daemon /v1/local/presets:validate routed through shared facade. CLI wrapper explicitly NOT added (per A6).
